question: What is GBPIET?
answer: Govind Ballabh Pant Institute of Engineering and Technology (GBPIET), Pauri Garhwal, Uttarakhand is a premier autonomous institute of the Government of Uttarakhand. Established in 1989, it started its first academic session in 1991-92. It offers B.Tech, M.Tech, MCA and PhD programs. The institute is UGC autonomous and AICTE approved.

question: Where is GBPIET located?
answer: GBPIET is located in Pauri Garhwal, Uttarakhand - 246194. How to reach: From Haridwar: 145 km via NH-58, From Dehradun: 155 km, From Rishikesh: 100 km, Nearest railway station: Kotdwar (75 km). More info: https://gbpiet.ac.in/about/how-to-reach/

question: What is the contact number of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Important Contacts: DWS (Dr. H. Goel): +91 8755068959, Chief Warden (Dr. M.K. Aggrawal): +91 9410323549, Dean Academics (Dr. Ashutosh Gupta): +91 9639890767

question: Who is the Director of GBPIET?
answer: The Director of GBPIET is Prof. (Dr.) V.K. Banga.

question: Is GBPIET accredited?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has UGC Autonomy extended for 5 years (2024-25 to 2028-29), AICTE Approved, affiliated to VMSBUTU. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/accreditation-and-aicte-approvals/

question: What is the vision of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Vision: To pivot for excellence in technical education and producing globally competent professionals. Mission: Produce quality manpower, provide best facilities for education and research, integrate technical skills and innovation, promote quality research for sustainable development.

question: What are the social media handles of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Social Media: Twitter/X: @gbpietpauri, Instagram: @officialgbpietpauri, Facebook: Search GBPIET Pauri, Website: https://gbpiet.ac.in

question: What is the anti-ragging policy of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has ZERO tolerance for ragging! Anti-ragging helpline: 7017059887 and 8126565328. Security Emergency: 8791884847. Guidelines: https://gbpiet.ac.in/conduct-rules/anti-ragging-measures/

question: How to login to GBPIET ERP portal?
answer: GBPIET ERP Portal: https://gbpiet.sitslive.com/Login. Use ERP to check attendance, view results, register for semester, pay fees, check timetable.

question: How to check results at GBPIET?
answer: Check GBPIET results at: https://gbpiet.ac.in/result/ or ERP Portal: https://gbpiet.sitslive.com/Login. For queries: 01368-228030

question: What cultural events does GBPIET organize?
answer: GBPIET organizes: Goonj (Annual cultural festival since 1996), Techno-Management fest, Internal Hackathons, Design Skill Contests (State Level), VMSBUTU Intercollegiate Tournament. Check: https://gbpiet.ac.in/student-life/

question: Does GBPIET have IEEE Student Branch?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has an active IEEE Student Branch organizing technical workshops and seminars. Visit: https://edu.ieee.org/in-gbpiet/

question: What is NPTEL at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has an active NPTEL Local Chapter providing access to 1000+ online courses from IITs and IISc. Students can earn free certificates. Visit: https://nptel.ac.in/

question: What is the alumni network of GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET has a strong alumni network. Alumni portal: https://www.alumni.gbpec.ac.in/. Alumni placed in Amazon, Microsoft, Infosys, TCS, BEL, BHEL, NTPC.

question: Does GBPIET have guest house?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has a Guest House for visiting faculty and guests. Requisition Form: https://gbpiet.ac.in/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Guest-House-Requisition_2.pdf

question: What is the transport facility at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET provides transport service on scheduled routes for students and staff. For queries: 01368-228030.

question: Does GBPIET have health centre?
answer: Yes! GBPIET has an on-campus Health Centre with medical staff. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/health-centre/

question: What sports facilities are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Sports Complex includes Cricket, Football, Basketball, Volleyball, Badminton, Table Tennis, Chess. The institute participates in VMSBUTU Intercollegiate Tournaments.

question: What is the library facility at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Central Library: 50,000+ books and reference materials, E-books and E-journals access, NPTEL Local Chapter, IEEE digital library. Details: https://gbpiet.ac.in/facilities/central-library/

question: What campus facilities are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Campus Facilities: Central Library (50,000+ books), Computer Centre, Central Workshop, IEEE Student Branch, NPTEL Local Chapter. Residential: 8 Boys Hostels and 3 Girls Hostels. Health Centre, Bank and ATMs, M.G. Auditorium, Sports Complex, High speed internet, Transport service, Post Office, Eateries, Shopping Centre, Guest House.

question: What scholarships are available at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET students can avail: State Government Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC, Merit scholarship for top performers, Central Sector Scholarship, Post Matric Scholarship. Apply through Uttarakhand Scholarship Portal.

question: When are the semester exams at GBPIET?
answer: GBPIET Semester Exams: Odd Semester (July-December): exams in November-December. Even Semester (January-June): exams in May-June. Check: https://gbpiet.ac.in/academic-calendar/
